pi_items.source: Calculated math.radians(30.0176) matching task.json instruction and verifier logic
Calculated math.radians(32.5802) matching task.json instruction and verifier logic
Confirmed SCREENSHOT_DIR in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh
Confirmed NOTES_FILE in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task requires reconstructing the March 29, 2021 supermoon syzygy event at the Suez Canal (where the Ever Given was refloated) using Stellarium. Verified the location matches 30.0176 N (0.5239 rad) and 32.5802 E (0.5686 rad). The expected output paths for the screenshots and text notes are accurately defined in the setup and export scripts as /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium and /home/ga/Desktop/suez_syzygy_notes.txt respectively. No synthetic data is injected, relying on Stellarium's native real-world ephemeris.
